title: Unions, Unknown Values, and Control-Flow Narrowing · Spiral Review
summary: Convert an unknown status feed into trusted records using evidence-producing guards and exhaustive decisions. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an unknown-to-domain validation pipeline after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use only operations valid for every union member until evidence supports narrowing.
Choose unknown, any, and never from trust, escape-hatch, and impossibility semantics.
Narrow with typeof, equality, truthiness, in, instanceof, and discriminant checks while respecting edge cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
